etymology.description: ńŞú(lăÉu) is an ancient form -> of Úůë(Úůë) (yăĺu, "wine vessel")
etymology.interpretation: The character ńŞú(lăÉu) served as an early representation of the wine vessel, which later evolved into the character Úůë(Úůë) (yăĺu, "wine vessel"). This underlines how early characters often depicted tangible objects like containers.
